name: English Shortbread
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Beat in the egg.
3. Sift together the flour and baking powder.
4. Add the dry ingredients to the creamed mixture, stirring well to blend.
5. Knead the dough lightly until it holds together.
6. Roll the dough on a floured surface to form a 14-inch square.
7. Cut into 49 squares measuring about 2 inches each.
8. Place the squares about 2 inches apart on an ungreased baking sheet.
9. Prick each square with a fork.
10. Bake in a 325°F oven for 12 minutes, or until lightly browned.
11. Remove from the baking sheets and cool on racks.
